nodes.context: Organised crime syndicate based in Ireland, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, firearms smuggling, extortion, and contract violence.
International organised crime group operating outside Ireland.

edges.evidence_quote: While The Family has clashed with smaller regional gangs over territory, Garda sources suggest the group has occasionally acted as a domestic distribution partner for international cartels, avoiding open conflict with the Kinahans in recent years.
edges.context: The Family has avoided open conflict with the Kinahan group and has occasionally acted as a distribution partner for international cartels.
